zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock於1366年1月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，他的父親Robert Maxwell21歲，母親Janet Forrester-44歲。他於1386年8月10日之前與Katherine Stewart結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年10月16日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock于1366年1月1日出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可时，他的父亲Robert Maxwell21岁，母亲Janet Forrester-44岁。他于1386年8月10日之前与Katherine Stewart结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年10月16日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock was born on 1 January 1366, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Maxwell, was 21 and his mother, Janet Forrester, was -44. He married Katherine Stewart before 10 August 1386. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 16 October 1421, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock est né le 1 janvier 1366, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Maxwell, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Janet Forrester, avait -44 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Stewart avant 10 août 1386. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock am 1. Januar 1366 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Maxwell 21 und seine Mutter Janet Forrester -44. Er hat vor 10. August 1386 Katherine Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1421 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock è nato il il 1 gennaio 1366 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Maxwell, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Janet Forrester, aveva -44 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Stewart prima del 10 agosto 1386. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 ottobre 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrockが1366年1月1日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで生まれた時，父Robert Maxwellは21歳，母Janet Forresterは-44歳であった。1386年8月10日以前にKatherine Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年10月16日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock(이)가 1366년 1월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Maxwell(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Forrester(은)는 -44세였다. 그는 1386년 8월 10일 이전 Katherine Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 10월 16일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에 묻혔다.

pt.1 January 1366–16 October 1421: 1 de janeiro de 1366–16 de outubro de 1421
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1366, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Maxwell, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Janet Forrester, tinha -44 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Stewart antes 10 de agosto de 1386. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1421, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock родился 1 января 1366 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Maxwell было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Janet Forrester, -44. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Stewart перед 10 августа 1386 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 октября 1421 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.1 January 1366–16 October 1421: 1 de enero de 1366–16 de octubre de 1421
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Herbert Maxwell of Caelavenrock nació el 1 de enero de 1366, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Maxwell, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Janet Forrester, tenía -44 años. Se casó con Katherine Stewart antes de 10 de agosto de 1386. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1421, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
